title: First Solar Q3 2021 Earnings Preview
text: First Solar Q3 2021 earnings preview showed consensus EPS estimate of $0.60, representing -58.6% year-over-year decline, with consensus revenue estimate of $688.1M, down -25.9% year-over-year. Historically, FSLR had beaten EPS estimates 75% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 50% of the time. The company reiterated full-year 2021 net sales guidance of $2.88-$3.1 billion and lifted expected cash from prior high-end forecast of $1.45 billion to $1.55 billion. Capital expenditure expectations for full-year were lower than previously thought. First Solar produced 2 gigawatts of modules during Q3 despite ongoing challenges around freight and from the pandemic, and started construction and purchased equipment for new factories in Ohio and India. The company was managing through pandemic-related supply chain disruptions while advancing its manufacturing expansion.
